title: Mini Paint Roller Sleeve – 4 inch(100MM) Small Painting Roller for Emulsion Paint and Gloss Paints with High Density Foam Roller | Pack of 10

Mini roller sleeves works perfect for all types of oil based gloss paints and emulsion paint where you need great accuracy
Foam paint roller made with high density foam to absorb the paint for equal distribution
Size of these Paint roller sleeves is 4" / 100mm wide
Package contains pack of 10 paint roller sleeves
